title: Select boards in "Search Everything?"
excerpt:
Is there a way to filter the “Search Everything” to certain boards? While it’s nice to see “everything” it would also be nice to filter out boards that have no relevance in my search. 
Thanks!

posts.author: TheBox (Mark )
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to filter the “Search Everything” to certain boards? While it’s nice to see “everything” it would also be nice to filter out boards that have no relevance in my search.

Thanks!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @TheBox! I am afraid this isn’t currently supported, however I’ve followed up internally to find out if this is something on our roadmap - will circle back here once I’ve heard back
